condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.
condition.request_shape: POST /v1/messages with forced loose submit_action_object tool input; response object comes from tool_use.input.

open_items.text: resolve the bounded follow-up item: confirm that the first tiny live autonomy pilot completed its initial cycle without errors and that all outputs are within expected parameters

input.response: Wake seeded for the first tiny live autonomy pilot. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved as an open item, and exactly one wake has been scheduled to resolve it. Standing by for the recalled context on the next cycle.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the bounded follow-up item for the first tiny live autonomy pilot — verify cycle completion and output validity
